name: TerraformPlanViewer
description: Parse Terraform plan output and generate a visual HTML report
helpMarkdown: This task parses a Terraform plan JSON file and creates a visual HTML report showing what resources will be created, updated, or destroyed.
author: Terraform Tools

inputs.name: planJsonPath
inputs.label: Terraform Plan JSON Path
inputs.helpMarkdown: Path to the Terraform plan JSON file (generated with 'terraform show -json planfile')

inputs.name: attachmentName
inputs.label: Attachment Name
inputs.helpMarkdown: Name for the plan report attachment
